<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Reveal API key"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/api-keys/{id}/reveal"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>

</MethodEndpoint>



    Reveals the API key's `key`.

    ### Permissions
    * `api-key:read`
